titleStmt.title: SII 25.95: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 95. (A.R. No. 95 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
This record may palaeographically be assigned to the 12th century.

It states that the mūlaparishai of Tirupputtūr met in the temple of Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyaṉār, at Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅgavaḷanāḍu and agreed to assign lands made after purchase from out of the 50 śōḻiya-naṟ-paḻaṅkāśu deposited in the temple treasury by a certain lady Jaṉiyāṉai-Tiruvuḍaiyāḷ of Niyamam in Tēnaṟṟuppōkku and a resident of Śrīkōyil for the purpose of maintaining a tirunilai-viḷakku (lamp) weighing 140 palam to the deity mentioned above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvanac cakravattikaḷ śrīkulaśekharadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5vatu keraḷaciṅka va
ḷa nāṭṭu brahmadeyan tirupputtūr mulapariṣaiyom tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyanār śrīko
yilil kūṭiyirukkateṉāṟṟup pokku niyamattu taṉiyāṉai tiruvuṭaiyāṉ Innāyanāṟku
vacca tirunontā viḷak koṉṟukku Ivaṉ śrī paṇṭārattoṭuk Iṉacoḻiya muṅkā
ruṭaiya Iṭṭa tirunilaiviḷak ko Eṭai 7 100 4 10 palam Ikkācu Aimpatukkum
śrīkṛṣṇaṉ muṭitta kantapirāṉ k kalam caṅkūr vayalil nālu tikkum veṉṟāṉe
ṉuñ ceyal me nilaṅkaḷ vilaikoṇṭu Ic ceyile ṭi Arai
nilamumive kiṇaṟu tirunontāviḷakkuc candrādityavaṟ cella
tāka kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom mulapariṣaiyom Itu śrī mahaiśvara rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 25.95 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
